request.description:
These `params` control the behavior and filtering of the **Google Maps Reviews Scraper** crawler. Use them to define review extraction context, result limits, and data collection features. ➡️ These parameters are specific to the **Google Maps Reviews Scraper** crawler. _Refer to the_ [Constructing the params Object](#13eb068f-2bae-4603-941e-9f36038fb379) _section to understand how to build these parameters and where to fetch possible values._ | Parameter | Type | Description | | --- | --- | --- | | **sort_by** | string | Sort reviews by criteria: `newest`, `most relevant`, or `highest rating`. | | **hours_back** | integer | Limits reviews collected to those published within the specified number of hours (e.g., `24` for the last day). Set `null` for no limit. | | **max_results** | integer | Limits the total number of reviews collected. The task completes once this number is reached. | | **language** | string | Defines the language for extracted reviews (e.g., `English (United States)`). | | **functions.short_link** | boolean | `true`: Collects a shortened link to the review.
`false`: Skips short link collection. | ⚠️ **Additional Notes:** - Ensure appropriate parameter selection to optimize scraping efficiency and cost. - **short_link**: Collecting short links may incur additional costs. Verify any additional charges associated with enabling this parameter.

response.name: Example

request.description:
Following are the result fields that are crawled by the **Google Maps Reviews Scraper**.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **id** | string | Unique identifier for the review result. |
| **object** | string | Type of returned object. |
| **squid** | string | Secondary unique identifier. |
| **run** | string | Identifier related to the scraping run. |
| **cid** | string | [Google Maps Customer ID](https://www.vendasta.com/blog/cid-number-google/). |
| **functions** | json object | Details about the data filling/scraping process. |
| **internal_review_id** | string | Internal unique ID for the review. |
| **is_user_local_guide** | boolean | Indicates if reviewer is a Google Local Guide. |
| **lang** | string | Language code of the original review. |
| **native_id** | integer | Native identifier for the review source. |
| **origin** | string | Source/origin of the review (e.g., Google). |
| **original_text** | string | Original review text in the native language. |
| **pictures** | string | URLs of any pictures included in the review. |
| **place_address** | string | Address of the reviewed place. |
| **place_average_score** | Float | Average rating of the reviewed place. |
| **place_id** | string | Unique Google Maps Place ID. |
| **place_name** | string | Name of the reviewed place. |
| **published_at** | string | Relative time when the review was published. |
| **published_at_datetime** | Timestamp | Exact datetime when the review was published. |
| **response_from_owner** | string | Response provided by the owner (if any). |
| **review_link** | string | Direct URL link to the detailed review. |
| **score** | integer | Rating score given by the user. |
| **scraping_time** | Timestamp | When the review data was scraped. |
| **short_review_link** _(requires_ `functions.short_link` _\= true)_ | string | Short URL link to the review _(⚠️ may incur additional costs)._ |
| **text** | string | English-translated review text. |
| **total_likes** | integer | Total number of likes for the review. |
| **total_reviews** | integer | Total number of reviews for the reviewed place. |
| **user_image_url** | string | URL of the user's profile image. |
| **user_internal_id** | string | Internal ID of the reviewer. |
| **user_link** | string | Link to the user's Google Maps profile. |
| **user_name** | string | Name of the reviewer. |
| **user_reviews_count** | integer | Total number of reviews posted by the reviewer. |
| **visited_in** | string | Date when the user visited the reviewed place. |
| **zero_x** | string | Google Maps location ID. |

> **Pagination fields** (`total_results`, `limit`, `page`, `total_pages`, `result_from`, `result_to`, `next`, `previous`) are documented in the [Get results](https://docs.lobstr.io/#f65cf0b0-7c96-4ef2-8f63-5500010549b0).

response.name: Example
